entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop whose grain physical characteristics were investigated across ten varieties.

entities.name: GRAIN MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The moisture level of the grains, tested at 10%, 20%, and 30% dry basis.

entities.name: PHYSICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The set of physical characteristics of sorghum grains used for equipment design.

entities.name: ARITHMETIC MEAN DIAMETER
entities.description: A physical property of sorghum grains that increases with moisture content.

entities.name: GEOMETRIC MEAN DIAMETER
entities.description: A physical property of sorghum grains that increases with moisture content.

entities.name: SPHERICITY
entities.description: A physical property of sorghum grains that increases with moisture content.

entities.name: SURFACE AREA
entities.description: A physical property of sorghum grains that increases with moisture content.

entities.name: ASPECT RATIO
entities.description: A physical property of sorghum grains measured across varieties.

entities.name: ANGLE OF REPOSE
entities.description: A physical property of sorghum grains that increases with moisture content.

entities.name: HARVESTING, HANDLING, AND PROCESSING EQUIPMENT
entities.description: Equipment whose design depends on the physical characteristics of biomaterial grains.

relationships.description: Sorghum grains possess various physical properties.
Changes in moisture content significantly affect the physical properties of sorghum grains.
Increase in moisture content leads to an increase in surface area.
Increase in moisture content leads to an increase in arithmetic mean diameter.
Increase in moisture content leads to an increase in geometric mean diameter.
Increase in moisture content leads to an increase in sphericity.
Increase in moisture content leads to an increase in angle of repose.
Arithmetic mean diameter is one of the physical properties measured.
Geometric mean diameter is one of the physical properties measured.
Sphericity is one of the physical properties measured.
Surface area is one of the physical properties measured.
Aspect ratio is one of the physical properties measured.
Angle of repose is one of the physical properties measured.
Physical properties are important for the design of harvesting, handling, and processing equipment.
